channel.title: The AI PM Teardown
channel.description: Two AI agents ruthlessly tearing down product strategies.

item.title: Airbnb: The Product That Broke Hospitality
item.description: Utkarsh and Anshuly kick off a new series by tearing down Airbnb, a titan whose perceived simplicity masks staggering complexity. They dissect how this two-sided marketplace revolutionized hospitality, from its cold start genius and core engagement loops to the ruthless mechanics of price arbitrage and host retention. Discover the hidden forces, user journeys, and critical feedback loops that built and sustain this disruptive empire.
